name: Amdocs Ltd.
lede: Amdocs runs two centers across two Indian cities. Gurugram and Pune, covering GBS and SSC, built over 22 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Amdocs office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Amdocs Ltd. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Amdocs runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Gurugram, Pune), covering GBS and SSC. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership

about.description: Amdocs's India footprint covers Gurugram and Pune, spanning GBS and SSC. The centers deliver IT, HR, Procurement and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 125 decision-makers, in one profile.
